title: ficus mollis
intro: Ficus mollis, also known as the weeping fig, is a species of evergreen tree or shrub native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, derived from its leaves and bark. The health benefits of Ficus mollis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ficus mollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
